port.description: Port on which targets receive traffic, unless overridden when registering a specific target. Required when target_type is instance, ip or alb. Does not apply when target_type is lambda.

protocol.description: Protocol to use for routing traffic to the targets

tags.description: A map of tags to add to all resources

target_type.description: The type of target that you must specify when registering targets with this target group.

vpc_id.description: Identifier of the VPC in which to create the target group.

deregistration_delay.description: The amount time for Elastic Load Balancing to wait before changing the state of a deregistering target from draining to unused
